reviews.comment:
Si a vas a cargar combustible tomate tu tiempo son lentísimos
La confitería tan típica que había,punto de reunión entre amigos durante décadas está cerrada.Recomendacion,carga nafta y andaté. .

(Translated by Google)
If you're going to fill up, take your time; they're extremely slow.
The traditional cafeteria that used to be a meeting place for friends for decades is closed. My recommendation: Fill up with gas and go.
